patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/sync.py b/asgiref/sync.py
index 54496ef..7f6ad6c 100644
--- a/asgiref/sync.py
+++ b/asgiref/sync.py
@@ -100,15 +100,9 @@ class ThreadSensitiveContext:
 
         return self
 
-    async def __aexit__(self, exc, value, tb):
-        if not self.token:
-            return
-
-        executor = SyncToAsync.context_to_thread_executor.pop(self, None)
-        if executor:
-            executor.shutdown()
-        SyncToAsync.thread_sensitive_context.reset(self.token)
-
+    async def __aexit__ (self, exc, value, tb) :
+        if self.token is not None:
+            SyncToAsync.thread_sensitive_context.reset(self.token)
 
 class AsyncToSync(Generic[_P, _R]):
     """
diff --git a/asgiref/testing.py b/asgiref/testing.py
index d6ccee5..9e15bbb 100644
--- a/asgiref/testing.py
+++ b/asgiref/testing.py
@@ -27,12 +27,12 @@ class ApplicationCommunicator:
             self._input_queue = asyncio.Queue()
         return self._input_queue
 
+    @property
     @property
     def output_queue(self):
         if self._output_queue is None:
             self._output_queue = asyncio.Queue()
         return self._output_queue
-
     @property
     def future(self):
         if self._future is None:
